name: OurRevolution.com
subject: WEDNESDAY: Watch Bernie and Keith Ellison
body:
Sisters and Brothers: The race for the next chairperson of the Democratic Party is heating up. The task ahead of us is to ensure that the Democratic Party is lead by someone who believes in the political revolution, not the political establishment.
Keith Ellison should be the next leader of the DNC, and on Wednesday he will give a major speech, joined by Bernie Sanders, to talk about his plans for the Democratic Party.
[**Will you watch on Wednesday night? RSVP now and we'll send you a link to the livestream before it starts at 8pm ET.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full")
Please see our earlier email to you below for more information. Thank you for being a part of our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
* * *

[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full")

Sisters and Brothers:
Keith Ellison is the right person to be the next leader of the Democratic Party, and next week Our Revolution is hosting a livestream event featuring Bernie Sanders and Keith Ellison to outline Keith's vision for the party.
If Democrats are going to win power to help advance a progressive agenda, we need a leader who will prioritize young people and grassroots organizing for the future of the Democratic Party. That's why our livestream event this Wednesday with Keith Ellison is something you need to see.
RSVP to watch this Wednesday's livestream event with Keith Ellison to talk about his platform for the Democratic Party's future.
[**Our Revolution Livestream with Keith Ellison and Bernie Sanders**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full")
Wednesday, December 14, 2016
8:00pm ET
**[RSVP TO WATCH»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/bernie-and-keith?source=em161213-full")**
The event will also include a call for unity from American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten, who will stress the importance of coming together to oppose the Trump Administration.
This a crucial moment for the future of our country. We hope you'll join Bernie, Keith and Randi this Wednesday.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greitens=20Political=20Alerts?=
subject: Gov-elect Eric Greitens Announces Choice for MOGOP Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Governor-elect Eric Greitens Announces Choice for MOGOP Leadership

Today, Governor-elect Eric Greitens announced his support of a leadership ticket for the Missouri Republican Party led by former U.S. Attorney Todd Graves. This team will work with the Governor-elect to advance conservative causes across the state and build on the party's success from 2016.

Governor-elect Greitens has endorsed longtime conservative leader Todd Graves to become the next chairman of the Missouri Republican Party. Todd is a partner at Graves-Garrett and former U.S. Attorney, appointed by George W. Bush after being twice elected as Platte County Prosecuting Attorney. He serves as President of the Pony Express Council of the Boy Scouts of America and is a founding board member of the Kansas City Missouri Police Foundation. Raised on a family farm near Tarkio, Missouri, Todd lives with his wife and four children on a farm just north of Kansas City.

Governor-elect Greitens said, "Todd Graves is a conservative fighter, a proven leader in business and his community, and a native Missourian. He will make an outstanding party chair and I’m excited to work with him and his team to take Missouri in a new direction."

The entire ticket endorsed by Governor-elect Greitens is listed below.

GOP Leadership Ticket
Todd Graves, Chair
Kay Hoflander, Vice Chair
Nick Meyers, Secretary
Pat Thomas, Treasurer

This ticket is also endorsed by:
Senator Roy Blunt
Lt. Gov. Peter Kinder
Lt. Gov-elect Mike Parson
Attorney General-elect Josh Hawley
Secretary of State-elect Jay Ashcroft
Treasurer-elect Eric Schmitt
Rep. Ann Wagner, 2nd District
Rep. Blaine Luetkemeyer, 3rd District
Rep. Vicky Hartzler, 4th District
Rep. Sam Graves, 6th District
Rep. Billy Long, 7th District
Rep. Jason Smith, 8th District
GOP Party Chairman John Hancock

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=0ec91520a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-0ec91520a6-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=0ec91520a6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_07&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-0ec91520a6-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=0ec91520a6) .

name: Democrats.org
subject: Our holiday card for the Obamas:
body:
Help us pick a winner. Democrats
---
**Vote for your favorite 2016 holiday card -- and we'll send you the winning design to sign for the First Family!

** **[PICK A CARD](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PICK+A+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd")**
Friend --

Every year, our team designs a holiday card to send to the First Family from our supporters. Each of us takes a crack at a design -- and we tend to get a little competitive with one another.

And this time around, we want you to be a part of choosing the one we'll send.

We've made three pretty cool holiday cards -- so we want you to vote on your favorite. When we have a winner, we'll send it to you for your chance to sign (and leave a note for the Obamas if you want)!

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Your-Holiday-Card-Vote1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+httpmydemocratsorgYourHolidayCardVote&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd")**

Happy voting, and happy holidays!

Meena

Meena Yi
Art Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c213/4067b0a/22fa5f48d/7e066ee2/593301328/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c213/4067b0a/22fa5f48d/7e066ee3/593301328/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c213/4067b0a/22fa5f48d/7e066ee0/593301328/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c213/4067b0a/22fa5f48d/7e066ee1/593301328/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161214_my_nd&source=em_20161214_my_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Activate your Inaugural Membership for the 2017 year. | Friend, Thank you. Because of your support, we delivered a massive victory that the world will never forget. We brought so many new members into our Party in 2016 -- so many first-time voters, independents, and even former Democrats who were betrayed by the corrupt establishment. But now we need to sustain this movement you created. It’s going to be a long four years, and Democrats and the media will do everything in their power to tear us apart. As long as we stand united, they will not win. As long as we have the resources to fight back against their lies and attacks, our victory will grow even BIGGER when we face another election in 2018. Please activate your 2017 Inaugural Membership with a generous donation of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250.
We didn’t win by being complacent. We won because we fought. We took control of our own fate. We refused to let the media write America’s future. But we need to keep working. We need to have the best outreach, the best data, the best ads, and the best strategy to handle the media. Your membership will help provide our united movement with a steady flow of resources in order to fend off the media’s attacks, deliver the TRUTH to voters, and help advance our First 100 Days agenda. Your support will even provide critical assistance in defending our cabinet nominees as they undergo grueling hearings by Senate Democrats. I have yet to take office and we’re already witnessing a series of smear campaigns against our movement and our cabinet nominees. But with your sustained support as a member for the 2017 year, we will be UNSTOPPABLE. We will keep winning and in so doing, America will keep winning. Friend, please activate your 2017 Inaugural Membership with a donation of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. today. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J.Trump ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP Please activate your 2017 Inaugural Membership with a generous donation of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba2SyBAF-PcCGlWgaXTmDRMN6aaaaBPGyBMFC43xa?l=~@tBsEt&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=r&o=&0=kHk Friend, please activate your 2017 Inaugural Membership with a donation of $15, $35, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. today. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba2SyBAF-PcCGlWgaXTmDRMN6aaaaBPGyBMFC43xa?l=~@tBsEt&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=q&o=&0=kHk ACTIVATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP ------------------------ http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjba2SyBAF-PcCGlWgaXTmDRMN6aaaaBPGyBMFC43xa?l=~@tBsEt&n=UynrcuZ1xE_XvRrc.lfv&c=p&o=&0=kHk Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. name: ADD YOUR NAME (via DSCC)
subject: PETITION: Denounce Trump's Secretary of State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Donald Trump's Cabinet is teeming with conflicts of interests! It's on us to fight back... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e802/244482147/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-state?source=PT-20161214-AddYourName-ProsHV")
---
_**New York Times: Rex Tillerson, Exxon CEO, Chosen as Secretary of State**_
[**Help Democrats OPPOSE Trump 's Cabinet pick >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e802/244482147/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-state?source=PT-20161214-AddYourName-ProsHV")
Friend -- Donald Trump wants a Big Oil tycoon to be the face of U.S. diplomacy -- and if that weren't dangerous enough, **he 's spent 18 years cozying up to Russia.** **Just look at his record:**

* Dismissed climate change with: **" What good is it to save the planet...?"**
* Lobbied President Obama to lift sanctions against Russia for Arctic drilling
* Awarded Russia's "Order of Friendship" award -- _by Vladimir Putin himself!_

Trump is so determined to complete his unscrupulous Cabinet that he promised "an aggressive public relations campaign to win confirmation for Tillerson." **Not if we have anything to say about it!**

[**ADD YOUR NAME: Denounce Trump 's pick for Secretary of State. We need 50,000 supporters on the record today! **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e802/244482147/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-state?source=PT-20161214-AddYourName-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Denounce Trump 's Secretary of State**: [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e802/244482147/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-state?source=PT-20161214-AddYourName-ProsHV")

Tillerson's nomination will breeze through Congress unless we put up a fight. _**That means getting loud NOW to send a message about his conflicts of interest!**_

[**Don 't wait, Friend -- Sign on immediately to help Democrats keep up the fight against Trump's shameful choice for Secretary of State >> **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e802/244482147/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-state?source=PT-20161214-AddYourName-ProsHV")

Thanks,
Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-trump-state?refcode=DPE-20161214-AddYourName-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e87c/244482147/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e87f/244482147/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eefd/2b07114c/4085e951/7368e87e/244482147/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

Just look at his record: Dismissed climate change with: " What good is it to save the planet...?" Lobbied President Obama to lift sanctions against Russia for Arctic drilling Awarded Russia's "Order of Friendship" award -- by Vladimir Putin himself! Trump is so determined to complete his unscrupulous Cabinet that he promised "an aggressive public relations campaign to win confirmation for Tillerson." Not if we have anything to say about it! "" Your Action History: Name : Friend Last Petition Signed : N/A Denounce Trump 's Secretary of State: "" Tillerson's nomination will breeze through Congress unless we put up a fight. That means getting loud NOW to send a message about his conflicts of interest! "" Thanks, Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts. Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back. name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: What the CIA concluded about Russian hacking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The CIA concluded Russia intervened in the 2016 election to help Trump. Add your name to join Democrats in demanding an immediate and fully independent Senate investigation. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d457/594788039/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161214-Breaking-ProsHV")
---
_**" Russian Hackers Acted to Aid Trump in Election, U.S. Says" (New York Times)**_
[**Add your name to call for an independent investigation >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d457/594788039/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161214-Breaking-ProsHV")
This is disturbing, Friend. The CIA has concluded that Russia intervened in the 2016 election, and that helping Donald Trump was their end goal.

As Americans, we can't stay silent while our electoral process is COMPROMISED by a foreign government. That's why we're calling for an immediate Senate investigation that is:
➜ **Independent** \-- carefully removing any doubts about partiality
➜ **Speedy** \-- delivering a thorough review of the hacking in a timely manner
➜ **Focused** \-- identifying any and all involvement by the Russians and ties to Trump [**Make your voice heard, Friend. Add your name to join Democrats in demanding an immediate and independent Senate investigation into the Russian hacking >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d457/594788039/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161214-Breaking-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Demand an Independent Investigation** : [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d457/594788039/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161214-Breaking-ProsHV")

Even with the CIA's troubling conclusion, many Senate Republicans seem reluctant to seriously investigate Russia's meddling. Case in point: while Mitch McConnell says that he now backs a limited, Republican controlled investigation, _during_ the election he fought to prevent any information about Russian involvement from being revealed. The GOP's silence about concerns affecting the integrity of our nation's elections is DEEPLY PROBLEMATIC.

With so much at stake, the American people deserve an independent investigation that Republicans can't sweep under the rug. But that won't happen unless we speak up. [**Please sign ASAP to call for a fully independent Senate investigation into the Russian hacking >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d457/594788039/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-investigation?source=PT-20161214-Breaking-ProsHV")

Thanks,
Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-investigate?refcode=DPE-20161214-Breaking-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d451/594788039/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d450/594788039/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee85/2b07114c/40978411/7368d453/594788039/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: VanHollen.org
subject: SIGN ON: stand up for transparency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
The CIA's recent finding about Russian government sponsored intervention in our Presidential election to defeat Hillary Clinton is a bombshell. Transparency has never been more important. |
Friend,

The CIA's recent finding about the Russian government sponsored intervention in our Presidential election to defeat Hillary Clinton is a bombshell. Transparency has never been more important.

That's why this week a bipartisan group of Congressional leaders sent a letter to the Director of National Intelligence demanding that members of the Electoral College receive an intelligence briefing on the extent of Russia's impact on our elections.

**[Please add your name to stand with us and demand transparency before we formally elect our next president.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4c/70cdc2ba/473b6688/3979f77/1169859303/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+add+your+name+to+stand+with+us+an&utm_campaign=em121416&source=em121416")** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4c/70cdc2ba/473b6688/3979f74/1169859303/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-for-transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em121416&source=em121416") Friend, next week the Electoral College will close the book on the 2016 election. This normally pro forma process has taken on new meaning after the CIA's finding on Russian intervention. Before Electors vote on December 19th, they have the right to see the evidence collected by the CIA on Russia's actions.

Our nation is too divided to allow any questions to remain about the legitimacy of the 2016 election and our new president.

Friend, add your name right now to demand that the Electoral College have the opportunity to receive a CIA briefing before they meet to formally elect President-elect Trump:
**[http://action.vanhollen.org/Stand-Up-For-Transparency](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4c/70cdc2ba/473b6688/3979f75/1169859303/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/Stand-Up-For-Transparency?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+httpactionvanhollenorgStandUpForTranspar&utm_campaign=em121416&source=em121416")**

Thank you for acting,

Team Van Hollen
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4c/70cdc2ba/473b6688/3979f72/1169859303/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em121416&source=em121416")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b4c/70cdc2ba/473b6688/3979f73/1169859303/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em121416&source=em121416") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
